citation.sourceDocument: U.S. Department of Education (Federal Student Aid), 2026-27 SAI and Pell Grant Eligibility Guide (dependent student; max Pell $7,395, student IPA $11,770, employment-expense allowance 35% capped at $5,000, family-of-four parents' IPA $44,880, +$6,990 per additional member). The per-size IPA values for other family sizes are scaled to that confirmed family-of-four anchor pending extraction of the exact published table; verify against the Guide.
